Apex Defender® is an advanced intrusion-detection system designed to protect you before you enter your home or vehicle. Using precision radar and intelligent presence-detection technology, the system scans interior spaces to identify whether a person is hiding inside your house, garage, or car when you return. 
 Think of it as a professional security sweep—automated. Apex Defender acts like a trained guard dog silently checking the space ahead of you, alerting you to potential intruders so you never walk into a dangerous situation unknowingly.
